revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with 'todo {{documentation}}'
Protected "[[Template:Sandbox other]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]; 2,000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Sandbox other]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 2000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Adding a bunch of hacky code to deal with a stupid inconsistency in the naming convention for CSS sandbox pages
Adding tfd tag
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Tfm/dated|page=Sandbox other|otherpage=When in sandbox|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2019 March 4#Template:Sandbox other|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}</noinclude>{{#if:{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|1}}{{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|/sandbox/styles.css$|plain=false|nomatch=}}|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}<!-- --><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
